name: Lab Sheet Generator
description: Renders a bench-ready markdown protocol from a structured construction file. Outputs a printable lab sheet with reagent tables, volumes, and thermocycler programs for each cloning step (PCR, GoldenGate, Gibson, Transform).

inputs.name: construction_record
inputs.description: The structured construction file dict from create_construction_file (the 'structured_construction_file' key). Must contain construct_name, assembly_strategy, and operations.

inputs.name: include_notes
inputs.description: If true, appends notes from the construction file at the bottom of the lab sheet. Default true.

outputs.description: Bench-ready lab sheet as markdown text.

lab_sheet_md.description: Full markdown text of the bench protocol.
